response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched video, identified dialogue and song. 
2. Song identified via on-screen text: 'DANZEN! ふたりはプリキュア'. 
3. Performer in video is Kanata and Lamy. 
4. Simplified artist name to 'Pretty Cure franchise' for search. 
5. Search query: `"DANZEN! ふたりはプリキュア" Pretty Cure Japanese and English lyrics`. 
6. Found lyrics on multiple sites, extracted original and English translation.
response.global_summary: A musical performance featuring two virtual idols (Kanata and Lamy) covering the anime song 'DANZEN! Futari wa Precure'. The video begins and ends with dialogue between the two characters discussing the concept of a 'hero', then transitions into their performance, featuring crowd scenes and stage effects.

scenes.description: Dialogue between two virtual idols (Kanata and Lamy) on a 3D stage discussing the definition of a hero.
The song 'DANZEN! Futari wa Precure' begins as the idols start performing on stage in front of a virtual crowd. The song title and credits appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
DANZEN! ふたりはプリキュア
プリキュア プリキュア プリキュア プリキュア
プリティで キュアキュア ふたりは プリキュア
一難去って、また一難 ぶっちゃけありえない！
制服着てても ふたりは
むちゃくちゃタフだし！
お互いピンチを乗り越えるたび
強くて 強く 強く 強くなるな☆
Yeah!
Your best! My best!
生きてるんだから 失敗なんて めじゃない！
笑う門には福来るでしょ！
ネガティブだって ブッ飛ぶぅ～！
生命の花 咲かせて！思いっきり～
もっとバリバリ！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
DANZEN! We are Precure
Precure! Precure! Precure! Precure!
Prettily, Cure Cure! We are Precure!
One disaster after another, it's unbelievable!
Even if we wear our uniforms, we are
Tougher than tough!
Every time we overcome a pinch together
We get stronger and stronger
It's happening, yeah!
Your best! My best!
Because we are alive, failure is not an option!
In the gate that laughs, happiness comes!
Even negativity will be blown away!
Let the flowers of life bloom to the fullest!
More and more, bang bang!

scenes.description: Dialogue between the two characters reflecting on their performance and discussing their next steps.
